LanguageData.TW_CompositeArmorReinforcementProtocol_M: This unit's protective capabilities are significantly enhanced.
LanguageData.TW_CompositeArmorReinforcementProtocol_R: This unit's protective capabilities are significantly enhanced.
LanguageData.TW_HighMobilityPhaseShiftDrive_M.label: High-Output Phase Shift Drive
LanguageData.TW_HighMobilityPhaseShiftDrive_M.descrip: This unit's movement speed is significantly boosted.
LanguageData.TW_HighMobilityPhaseShiftDrive_R.label: High-Output Phase Shift Drive
LanguageData.TW_HighMobilityPhaseShiftDrive_R.descrip: This unit's movement speed is significantly boosted.
LanguageData.TW_LongRangeBallisticsOptimizationSystem: This unit's weapon range is increased by 20%.
LanguageData.TW_Optical_Camo_Disruption_M.label: Optical Camouflage Disruption Device
LanguageData.TW_Optical_Camo_Disruption_M.description: Random mechanoid units are equipped with optical camouflage modules, rendering them invisible on the battlefield. Camouflage deactivates when player units come within 5 tiles.
LanguageData.TW_Optical_Camo_Disruption_R.label: Optical Camouflage Disruption Device
LanguageData.TW_Optical_Camo_Disruption_R.description: Random mechanoid units are equipped with optical camouflage modules, rendering them invisible. Camouflage deactivates when player units come within 45 tiles.[melee will then be 5 tiles] Until then, the unit is invulnerable and will not attack.
LanguageData.TW_Overdrive_M.label: Mechanical Overdrive
LanguageData.TW_Overdrive_M.description: This mechanoid is temporarily overloaded due to massive energy infusion.
LanguageData.TW_Overdrive_M.stages.0.label: Overdrive
LanguageData.TW_Overdrive_M.stages.1.label: Energy Surplus
LanguageData.TW_Overdrive_M.stages.2.label: Stabilizing
LanguageData.TW_Overdrive_M.stages.3.label: Stable
LanguageData.TW_TacticalArtilleryCoordinationModule_A: Summons mortar support for combat assistance when player units are detected within a 150-tile radius.
LanguageData.TW_TacticalArtilleryCoordinationModule_C: Tactical Coordination Module: Blast Cannon Support
Summons blast cannon support for combat assistance when player units are detected within a 45-tile radius.
LanguageData.TW_TacticalArtilleryCoordinationModule_L: Tactical Coordination Module: Point Defense Support
Summons point-defense systems for combat assistance when player units are detected within a 150-tile radius.
